name: io.github.dynamitejobs/dj
title: DJ Company API
description: Read and act on your own Dynamite Jobs company data via the public DJ Company API — jobs, applications, candidates, analytics, billing.

environmentVariables.name: DJ_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your DJ Company API key (dj_<companyID>_<random>). Generate from the DJ dashboard → Settings → API Access.
